teamObjective.explanation: Avoid handing the opponents an easy tempo gain while progressing my hand. Leading the minimum card advances play at lowest cost.

partnerBelief.summary: Partner state is uncertain; only public events and hand counts are used.

opponentBelief.summary: Opponent state is uncertain; no hidden cards are asserted as facts.

actionRationale.primaryReason: Avoid handing the opponents an easy tempo gain while progressing my hand. Leading the minimum card advances play at lowest cost.

whyNotAlternatives.reason: Leads the highest card in hand but still loses to any 7+ non-trump or any trump. It throws away the only card with marginal endplay value and is dominated by leading the 3.

risks: Schema repair may preserve imperfect reasoning from the raw model output.
riskAssessment.mitigation: Treat the repaired trace as schema-normalized reasoning; do not add hidden-card facts beyond the raw output.

notes: Deterministically schema-repaired from a ToM-prompted raw output; selectedActionId is unchanged.
